features: This anti-itching cream has a soft, smooth texture for long-lasting comfort, helping reduce itching and redness while providing 24-hour hydration and strengthening your skin.
Put an end to itchy eyes with a soothing glycyrrhizic acid derivative, while omega-rich cotton oil and shea butter replenish eyelid skin and plumping hyaluronic acid smooths out lines and wrinkles
Safe for Sensitive, Reactive Skin. Tested on allergy-prone and sensitive skin; fragrance-free, alcohol-free, and ophthalmologist-tested for safety
Helps Soothe Blepharitis Symptoms. Designed for eyes prone to blepharitis and eczema flare-ups, it reduces irritation and protects delicate eyelid skin.
Apply to the eyelids and eye area once or twice daily as needed until itching, irritation and flakiness subside; avoid direct contact with the eyes; not suitable for children under 3 years.
Use in combination with the PALPEBRAL Makeup Remover, PALPEBRAL Mascara Protect for extra comfort and the faster reduction of irritation.
description: Product Description Previous page Persistently sensitive or irritated eye area? Dry, flaky, scaly + itchy around the eyes? Try the no. 1 cream prescribed by French dermatologists Morning, evening + as needed Gently apply, then pat around the eye area using your ring finger - safe on eyelids +/or under eye From the first use: Soothes irritation + itching, reduces redness + limits appearance of irritation. Hydrates + restores Next page 1 WHO IS IT FOR? 2 HOW TO USE IT 3 WHAT TO EXPECT Previous page Sensitive Eye Cream Morning + evening (or during the day if necessary) apply Palpebral Eye Cream to irritable eye areas Mascara Protect Enhance + protect your lashes with PALPEBRAL Black Mascara Protect for sensitive eyes Eye Makeup Remover Gently cleanse with PALPEBRAL Eye Makeup Remover, an ultra-soothing micellar eye gel Next page 1 TREAT 2 PROTECT + PERFECT 3 CLEANSE EYE CREAM Pair + Compare PALPEBRAL SVR Range PALPEBRAL Sensitive Eye Cream Product type Mascara (Black) Hypersensitive eyes Hypoallergenic Soothes itching Relieves irritation OK with contact lens PALPEBRAL SVR Range PALPEBRAL Sensitive Eye Cream Product type Eye Makeup Remover Hypersensitive eyes Hypoallergenic Soothes itching Relieves irritation OK with contact lens PALPEBRAL SVR Range SENSIFINE Sensitive Eye Cream Product type Face + Eye Cleanser Hypersensitive eyes Hypoallergenic Soothes itching Relieves irritation OK with contact lens PALPEBRAL SVR Range SENSIFINE AR Sensitive Eye Cream Product type Face + Eye Cleanser Hypersensitive eyes Hypoallergenic Soothes itching Relieves irritation OK with contact lens Previous page MASCARA PROTECT Learn More EYE MAKEUP REMOVER Learn More DOUBLE CLEANSING BALM Learn More MICELLAR WATER Learn More Next page
